regulations.name: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide from the People's Republic of China: Initiation of Countervailing Duty Investigation
regulations.summary: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide (CBS) is a rubber vulcanization accelerator used in industrial rubber products, including components relevant to battery manufacturing and supply chains. The initiation of a countervailing duty (CVD) investigation by the U.S. Commerce Department signals potential new tariffs on this Chinese-origin chemical input, which may raise costs or disrupt sourcing for manufacturers relying on Chinese suppliers. For secondary battery domain concerns, this reinforces the need to evaluate Chinese supplier inclusion in SCM construction and assess feedstock supply chain risks tied to U.S. trade remedy actions.
regulations.rd_impact: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide (CBS) is a rubber vulcanization accelerator used in industrial rubber products, including components relevant to battery manufacturing and supply chains. The initiation of a countervailing duty (CVD) investigation by the U.S. Commerce Department signals potential new tariffs on this Chinese-origin chemical input, which may raise costs or disrupt sourcing for manufacturers relying on Chinese suppliers. For secondary battery domain concerns, this reinforces the need to evaluate Chinese supplier inclusion in SCM construction and assess feedstock supply chain risks tied to U.S. trade remedy actions.
regulations.citation_quote: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide from the People's Republic of China: Initiation of Countervailing Duty Investigation

regulations.name: Initiation of Antidumping and Countervailing Duty Administrative Reviews
regulations.summary: AD/CVD administrative reviews of orders with April anniversary dates may directly affect the cost and availability of battery-related raw materials and components sourced from countries subject to these duties, particularly China. Companies building supply chain maps (SCM) that include Chinese suppliers must account for potential retroactive duty adjustments arising from these reviews. This also intersects with battery passport and BOM/origin data requirements, as duty status changes can alter supplier eligibility and origin declarations.
regulations.rd_impact: AD/CVD administrative reviews of orders with April anniversary dates may directly affect the cost and availability of battery-related raw materials and components sourced from countries subject to these duties, particularly China. Companies building supply chain maps (SCM) that include Chinese suppliers must account for potential retroactive duty adjustments arising from these reviews. This also intersects with battery passport and BOM/origin data requirements, as duty status changes can alter supplier eligibility and origin declarations.
regulations.citation_quote: The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) has received requests to conduct administrative reviews of various antidumping duty (AD) and countervailing duty (CVD) orders with April anniversary dates.

regulations.name: Antidumping or Countervailing Duty Order, Finding, or Suspended Investigation; Opportunity To Request Administrative Review and Join Annual Inquiry Service List
regulations.summary: This notice opens the annual administrative review window for existing U.S. antidumping (AD) and countervailing duty (CVD) orders, which may include orders on battery materials and components (e.g., graphite electrodes, lithium, anode/cathode materials) sourced from China and other countries. For secondary_battery supply chain planning, any Chinese suppliers subject to AD/CVD orders will face duty rate re-determinations that could materially affect landed cost and sourcing decisions — directly relevant to the SCM 구축 시 중국 기업 포함 여부 판단 concern. Additionally, companies importing covered materials should evaluate whether to request a review to lock in or contest applicable duty rates before the deadline.

For secondary_battery supply chain planning, any Chinese suppliers subject to AD/CVD orders will face duty rate re-determinations that could materially affect landed cost and sourcing decisions — directly relevant to the SCM 구축 시 중국 기업 포함 여부 판단 concern. Additionally, companies importing covered materials should evaluate whether to request a review to lock in or contest applicable duty rates before the deadline.
regulations.citation_quote: Antidumping or Countervailing Duty Order, Finding, or Suspended Investigation; Opportunity To Request Administrative Review and Join Annual Inquiry Service List

regulations.name: 60-Day Notice of Proposed Information Collection: Application for Permanent/Temporary Export or Temporary Import of Classified Defense Articles and Classified Technical Data
regulations.summary: This notice proposes an information collection requirement for the export/import of classified defense articles and classified technical data, directly implicating export control eligibility for space-related components and materials. Organizations handling dual-use or space-grade classified hardware must prepare for continued or updated OMB-approved reporting obligations. The 60-day comment window represents an opportunity to engage before the collection is finalized with OMB.
regulations.rd_impact: This notice proposes an information collection requirement for the export/import of classified defense articles and classified technical data, directly implicating export control eligibility for space-related components and materials. Organizations handling dual-use or space-grade classified hardware must prepare for continued or updated OMB-approved reporting obligations. The 60-day comment window represents an opportunity to engage before the collection is finalized with OMB.
regulations.citation_quote: Application for Permanent/Temporary Export or Temporary Import of Classified Defense Articles and Classified Technical Data

regulations.name: Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard No. 214; Side Impact Protection; FMVSS No. 305a; Electric-Powered Vehicles: Electric Powertrain Integrity; FMVSS No. 307; Fuel System Integrity of Hydrogen Vehicles
regulations.summary: This final rule amends FMVSS No. 307, which governs fuel system integrity of hydrogen vehicles, directly affecting hydrogen vehicle safety standards. Changes to hydrogen vehicle powertrain and fuel system regulations may influence project timelines, certification requirements, and compliance costs for hydrogen mobility initiatives. Teams tracking hydrogen subsidies and IRA 45V project timelines should note that vehicle-level safety standards form part of the broader regulatory landscape for hydrogen deployment.
regulations.rd_impact: This final rule amends FMVSS No. 307, which governs fuel system integrity of hydrogen vehicles, directly affecting hydrogen vehicle safety standards. regulations.citation_quote: Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard No. 307; Fuel System Integrity of Hydrogen Vehicles

regulations.name: Commission Report on Progress Towards Union-wide CO2 Injection Capacity Target
regulations.summary: This European Commission report tracks progress toward the EU's Union-wide CO2 injection capacity target, which is a core pillar of carbon capture and storage (CCS) infrastructure policy. For green_eco domain stakeholders, CCS developments directly affect decarbonization pathways, Scope 3 reporting obligations, and feedstock supply chain sustainability credentials. Regulatory momentum around CO2 injection capacity may impose indirect compliance burdens on industrial emitters and influence EPR and green certification frameworks.
regulations.rd_impact: This European Commission report tracks progress toward the EU's Union-wide CO2 injection capacity target, which is a core pillar of carbon capture and storage (CCS) infrastructure policy. regulations.citation_quote: REPORT FROM THE COMMISSION TO THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND THE COUNCIL on the progress towards reaching the Union-wide target for CO2 injection capacity

regulations.name: Support to Implementation of Critical Raw Materials Act (2024/1252) Article 26 – National Measures on Circularity: Priority List of Waste Streams, Evidence and Methodology
regulations.summary: EU Critical Raw Materials Act (CRMA) Article 26 mandates national circularity measures including priority waste stream lists, directly affecting battery supply chain management by establishing obligations around recycled content sourcing and waste recovery for critical raw materials (e.g., lithium, cobalt, nickel). This implementation guidance shapes how battery manufacturers must prepare BOM and recycled-content data for Battery Passport compliance. It also influences supplier selection for lithium-metal anode materials, as recycled raw material certification and traceability requirements will be tied to nationally defined priority waste streams.
regulations.rd_impact: EU Critical Raw Materials Act (CRMA) Article 26 mandates national circularity measures including priority waste stream lists, directly affecting battery supply chain management by establishing obligations around recycled content sourcing and waste recovery for critical raw materials (e.g., lithium, cobalt, nickel). This implementation guidance shapes how battery manufacturers must prepare BOM and recycled-content data for Battery Passport compliance. It also influences supplier selection for lithium-metal anode materials, as recycled raw material certification and traceability requirements will be tied to nationally defined priority waste streams.
regulations.citation_quote: Support to implementation of 2024/1252 Critical Raw Materials Act Article 26 : national measures on circularity : priority list of waste streams, evidence and methodology

regulations.name: Annual Report on R&TD Activities of the EU and Monitoring of Horizon Europe in 2025
regulations.summary: This annual EU Commission report monitors Horizon Europe R&D activities in 2025, which directly encompasses battery technology research funding and supply chain development relevant to secondary battery domains. It signals EU-level R&D policy direction for battery materials, recycling content, and passport-related data infrastructure. Tracking this report is essential for anticipating shifts in EU funding priorities that may affect SCM strategy, battery passport data readiness, and material supplier selection under recycled content mandates.
regulations.rd_impact: This annual EU Commission report monitors Horizon Europe R&D activities in 2025, which directly encompasses battery technology research funding and supply chain development relevant to secondary battery domains. It signals EU-level R&D policy direction for battery materials, recycling content, and passport-related data infrastructure. regulations.citation_quote: Annual Report on Research and Technological Development Activities of the European Union and Monitoring of Horizon Europe in 2025

regulations.name: 기후위기 대응을 위한 탄소중립ㆍ녹색성장 기본법 (Carbon Neutrality and Green Growth Framework Act)
regulations.summary: 한국의 탄소중립기본법은 녹색성장 및 탄소중립 정책 프레임워크를 법제화함으로써 green_eco 도메인 전반에 직접적인 영향을 미칩니다. 재활용 함량 의무, EPR 분담금, Scope 3 산정을 위한 소재·부품 데이터 확보 등 공급망 ESG 대응 요건이 강화될 수 있으며, DPP(디지털 제품 여권) 관련 데이터 준비 부담이 증가할 수 있습니다. secondary_battery 도메인과도 연계되어 배터리 원료 수급·재활용 원료 의무 함유량 정책 방향에 영향을 줄 가능성이 있습니다.
regulations.rd_impact: 한국의 탄소중립기본법은 녹색성장 및 탄소중립 정책 프레임워크를 법제화함으로써 green_eco 도메인 전반에 직접적인 영향을 미칩니다. 재활용 함량 의무, EPR 분담금, Scope 3 산정을 위한 소재·부품 데이터 확보 등 공급망 ESG 대응 요건이 강화될 수 있으며, DPP(디지털 제품 여권) 관련 데이터 준비 부담이 증가할 수 있습니다. secondary_battery 도메인과도 연계되어 배터리 원료 수급·재활용 원료 의무 함유량 정책 방향에 영향을 줄 가능성이 있습니다.

regulations.name: 기후위기 대응을 위한 탄소중립·녹색성장 기본법 시행령 (Carbon Neutrality and Green Growth Framework Act Enforcement Decree)
regulations.summary: This enforcement decree operationalizes South Korea's Carbon Neutrality and Green Growth Framework Act, introducing binding implementation rules around carbon neutrality targets, green growth policy, and lifecycle emissions management. For green_eco domain concerns, this directly heightens Scope 3 data obligations, DPP-adjacent material/component disclosure requirements, and EPR-related compliance burdens by embedding them into national law execution. For secondary_battery, the decree's green supply chain and recycled content provisions may reinforce mandatory recycled material thresholds and origin-tracking obligations relevant to battery passport and BOM data preparation. Hydrogen domain stakeholders should monitor how the decree defines clean energy eligibility and subsidy qualification criteria, as alignment with Korea's carbon neutrality roadmap may affect project timelines and funding access.
regulations.rd_impact: This enforcement decree operationalizes South Korea's Carbon Neutrality and Green Growth Framework Act, introducing binding implementation rules around carbon neutrality targets, green growth policy, and lifecycle emissions management. For green_eco domain concerns, this directly heightens Scope 3 data obligations, DPP-adjacent material/component disclosure requirements, and EPR-related compliance burdens by embedding them into national law execution. For secondary_battery, the decree's green supply chain and recycled content provisions may reinforce mandatory recycled material thresholds and origin-tracking obligations relevant to battery passport and BOM data preparation. Hydrogen domain stakeholders should monitor how the decree defines clean energy eligibility and subsidy qualification criteria, as alignment with Korea's carbon neutrality roadmap may affect project timelines and funding access.
regulations.source_url: https://www.law.go.kr/법령/기후위기 대응을 위한 탄소중립ㆍ녹색성장 기본법 시행령(014255)

regulations.name: 우주개발 진흥법 (Space Development Promotion Act)
regulations.summary: 한국의 우주개발 진흥법은 우주용 부품·소재의 개발 및 사용에 관한 규제 체계를 수립하며, space_environment 도메인의 수출통제 적격성 및 우주 파편 경감 의무와 직접적으로 연관된다. 우주 관련 기술·부품의 수출입 통제 및 인증 요건이 포함될 수 있어, 우주용 소재 및 부품 공급망 관리에 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 우주 파편 경감 관련 의무 조항이 존재할 경우 위성 및 발사체 운용 기업의 설계·운용 기준 준수가 요구될 수 있으므로 지속적인 모니터링이 필요하다.
regulations.rd_impact: 한국의 우주개발 진흥법은 우주용 부품·소재의 개발 및 사용에 관한 규제 체계를 수립하며, space_environment 도메인의 수출통제 적격성 및 우주 파편 경감 의무와 직접적으로 연관된다. 우주 관련 기술·부품의 수출입 통제 및 인증 요건이 포함될 수 있어, 우주용 소재 및 부품 공급망 관리에 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 우주 파편 경감 관련 의무 조항이 존재할 경우 위성 및 발사체 운용 기업의 설계·운용 기준 준수가 요구될 수 있으므로 지속적인 모니터링이 필요하다.

regulations.name: 우주개발 진흥법 시행령 (Enforcement Decree of the Space Development Promotion Act)
regulations.summary: This enforcement decree implements South Korea's Space Development Promotion Act, directly governing regulations on space components, materials, and related activities — all of which fall under the space_environment domain concerns including export control eligibility for space-use parts and materials, and space debris mitigation obligations. As a subordinate decree, it operationalizes statutory requirements into enforceable rules that affect procurement, certification, and compliance timelines for space programs. Ongoing monitoring is required to track specific articles addressing space debris mitigation mandates and any import/export control provisions for space-grade components and materials.
regulations.rd_impact: This enforcement decree implements South Korea's Space Development Promotion Act, directly governing regulations on space components, materials, and related activities — all of which fall under the space_environment domain concerns including export control eligibility for space-use parts and materials, and space debris mitigation obligations. As a subordinate decree, it operationalizes statutory requirements into enforceable rules that affect procurement, certification, and compliance timelines for space programs. Ongoing monitoring is required to track specific articles addressing space debris mitigation mandates and any import/export control provisions for space-grade components and materials.

regulations.name: 우주개발 진흥법 시행규칙 (Enforcement Rules of the Space Development Promotion Act)
regulations.summary: This enforcement rule under South Korea's Space Development Promotion Act directly governs space-related activities including component/material standards and operational requirements for space programs. It is relevant to space_environment domain concerns around export control eligibility, space-grade parts and materials regulation, and space debris mitigation obligations. R&D operations involving space hardware, launches, or satellite systems operating under Korean jurisdiction must ensure compliance with these implementing rules, which may impose certification, reporting, or technical requirements on space components and mission designs.
regulations.rd_impact: This enforcement rule under South Korea's Space Development Promotion Act directly governs space-related activities including component/material standards and operational requirements for space programs. It is relevant to space_environment domain concerns around export control eligibility, space-grade parts and materials regulation, and space debris mitigation obligations. R&D operations involving space hardware, launches, or satellite systems operating under Korean jurisdiction must ensure compliance with these implementing rules, which may impose certification, reporting, or technical requirements on space components and mission designs.

regulations.name: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 (Hydrogen Economy Promotion and Hydrogen Safety Management Act)
regulations.summary: 본 법률은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 종합적인 법적 프레임워크를 제공하며, 청정수소 인증 기준 및 보조금 적격성 요건에 직접적인 영향을 미친다. 수소 생산·유통·활용 전반에 걸친 규제 체계가 수소 프로젝트의 타임라인 및 투자 적격성 판단에 중요한 변수로 작용한다. 특히 청정수소 정의와 인증 기준의 법적 근거로 기능하여, 국내 수소 사업의 보조금 수급 및 CfD 구조 설계 시 준수 여부를 사전 검토해야 한다.
regulations.rd_impact: 본 법률은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 종합적인 법적 프레임워크를 제공하며, 청정수소 인증 기준 및 보조금 적격성 요건에 직접적인 영향을 미친다. 수소 생산·유통·활용 전반에 걸친 규제 체계가 수소 프로젝트의 타임라인 및 투자 적격성 판단에 중요한 변수로 작용한다. 특히 청정수소 정의와 인증 기준의 법적 근거로 기능하여, 국내 수소 사업의 보조금 수급 및 CfD 구조 설계 시 준수 여부를 사전 검토해야 한다.
regulations.source_url: https://www.law.go.kr/법령/수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률(013670)
regulations.citation_quote: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률

regulations.name: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행령 (Hydrogen Economy Promotion and Hydrogen Safety Management Act Enforcement Decree)
regulations.summary: This enforcement decree implements the Korean Hydrogen Economy Promotion and Hydrogen Safety Management Act, directly governing clean hydrogen definitions, certification standards, and safety management frameworks in South Korea. It affects hydrogen project eligibility for subsidies and sets operational compliance requirements for hydrogen production, storage, and distribution facilities. R&D teams must monitor whether the decree's clean hydrogen certification criteria align with or diverge from international benchmarks (e.g., IRA 45V), as misalignment could impact project timelines and subsidy eligibility for cross-border hydrogen ventures.
regulations.rd_impact: This enforcement decree implements the Korean Hydrogen Economy Promotion and Hydrogen Safety Management Act, directly governing clean hydrogen definitions, certification standards, and safety management frameworks in South Korea. It affects hydrogen project eligibility for subsidies and sets operational compliance requirements for hydrogen production, storage, and distribution facilities. R&D teams must monitor whether the decree's clean hydrogen certification criteria align with or diverge from international benchmarks (e.g., IRA 45V), as misalignment could impact project timelines and subsidy eligibility for cross-border hydrogen ventures.
regulations.source_url: https://www.law.go.kr/법령/수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행령(014015)

regulations.name: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행규칙
regulations.summary: 본 시행규칙은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률의 세부 집행 기준을 규정하며, 청정수소 인증 요건·안전관리 기준 등 수소 사업 운영 전반에 직접적인 규제 틀을 제공한다. 청정수소 정의 및 인증 기준 변동 리스크와 직결되어, 수소 프로젝트의 보조금 적격성 판단 및 타임라인 설계에 영향을 미친다. 특히 2028년 IRA 45V 착공 마감일을 앞두고 국내 청정수소 인증 기준과의 정합성 검토가 필요하다.
regulations.rd_impact: 본 시행규칙은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률의 세부 집행 기준을 규정하며, 청정수소 인증 요건·안전관리 기준 등 수소 사업 운영 전반에 직접적인 규제 틀을 제공한다. 청정수소 정의 및 인증 기준 변동 리스크와 직결되어, 수소 프로젝트의 보조금 적격성 판단 및 타임라인 설계에 영향을 미친다. 특히 2028년 IRA 45V 착공 마감일을 앞두고 국내 청정수소 인증 기준과의 정합성 검토가 필요하다.

regulations.citation_quote: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행규칙
